summary: review malfunction landed an unsafe candidate

body: Candidate 5b3a048d4 uses stale metadata read at cli/internal/bead/lock.go before an unconditional os.Rename of the current pathname. Counterexample: contenders A and B both read the original stale pid/acquired_at; A renames and removes it, then acquires a fresh replacement lock; delayed B renames that fresh directory to its unique tombstone and removes it. The tests in cli/internal/bead/lock_stale_test.go do not install a barrier after both stale observations and before the delayed rename, so they do not prove AC2. Formal candidate review produced two empty verdicts and classification review_malfunction, yet CLI landing bug ddx-079fb224 merged it. Merge 7feaa1b was reverted by f08a2cdaa; bead reopened and depends on ddx-079fb224.
summary: REQUEST_CHANGES: delayed stale observer can delete replacement lock
